items.title: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform Release
items.description: Release of Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform improvements covering charge point connectivity & protocol gateway, charge point management across Web Portal, Public APIs.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve profitable charging network through stronger charge point connectivity & protocol gateway support and cleaner workflow execution.
Improve network utilization through stronger charge point management support and cleaner workflow execution.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve annual recurring revenue from cpms through stronger charge point connectivity & protocol gateway support and cleaner workflow execution.
Improve account expansion through stronger charge point management support and cleaner workflow execution.

productBricks.change: Released Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Charge Point Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Session Orchestration with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Web Portal.
Deployed workflow updates in Public APIs.
Deployed workflow updates in Partner Integrations.

items.title: Pan-European Roaming & Interoperability Hub Release
items.description: Release of Pan-European Roaming & Interoperability Hub improvements covering roaming hub & interoperability gateway, partner management across Public APIs, Partner Portal.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve session reliability through stronger roaming hub & interoperability gateway support and cleaner workflow execution.
Improve authorization success rate through stronger partner management support and cleaner workflow execution.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve revenue growth through stronger roaming hub & interoperability gateway support and cleaner workflow execution.
Improve revenue per active driver through stronger partner management support and cleaner workflow execution.

productBricks.change: Released Roaming Hub & Interoperability Gateway with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Partner Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Roaming Transaction Exchange & Dispute Handling with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Driver Authorization Service with domain-specific workflow improvements.

Deployed workflow updates in OCPI Gateway API.

items.title: EV Driver Experience Platform Release
items.description: Release of EV Driver Experience Platform improvements covering ev driver app, driver authorization service across iOS App, Android App.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve session success rate through stronger ev driver app support and cleaner workflow execution.
Improve average session start time through stronger driver authorization service support and cleaner workflow execution.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve sessions per active driver through stronger ev driver app support and cleaner workflow execution.
Improve cross-border session share through stronger driver authorization service support and cleaner workflow execution.

productBricks.change: Released EV Driver App with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Driver Authorization Service with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Accessibility & Location Publishing with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Session Orchestration with domain-specific workflow improvements.

Deployed workflow updates in Web App.
